extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity. I counted only the Against rows: criminal proceedings are 2 against the Company, 1 against the Directors, 1 against the Promoter and nil against subsidiaries, while statutory/regulatory proceedings are 7 against the Company and nil against the other listed entities; tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries are 20 and nil respectively, excluding promoter/director personal tax matters and all By rows. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and subsidiaries is ₹73.26 million for the Company plus nil for subsidiaries, or ₹7.326 crore; promoter/director amounts and By amounts are excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of September 30, 2020 in ₹ million without a stated Total row, so the listed amounts of 31.03, 3.89, 9.10, 0.41, 10.48 and 71.78 million were summed to ₹126.69 million, or ₹12.669 crore. The only concentration percentages disclosed concern business segments or products, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customers; the 24.51% foreign-currency-linked revenue figure is not customer concentration. Litigation and contingent-liability tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
